ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "insurance_info" TEXT /* Insurance information of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "vital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign measurement */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the measurement belongs to */,
  "body_temp" TEXT /* Body temperature of the patient */,
  "blood_o2_level" INTEGER /* Blood oxygen level of the patient */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate of the patient */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the device used for the measurement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vital sign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vital sign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chronic disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the chronic disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chronic disease */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the disease */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Possible treatment options for the disease */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_diseases" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chronic disease */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date when the disease was diagnosed */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current treatment status of the disease */,
  "next_appointment" TEXT /* Date of the next appointment related to the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient-disease record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient-disease record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antibodies" (
  "antibody_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antibody type */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the antibody belongs to */,
  "antibody_name" TEXT /* Name of the antibody */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the antibody */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the antibody measurement was taken */,
  "lab_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the lab where the measurement was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the antibody record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the antibody record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antibody_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antibodies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
